description: AsterDrive Prometheus dashboard for HTTP, database, storage, uploads, downloads, background tasks, authentication, share rollback, and process health.

panels.description: Prometheus scrape health for the selected AsterDrive target.
panels.title: Target Health

panels.description: AsterDrive process uptime from metrics initialization.
panels.title: Uptime

panels.description: Current RSS memory reported by sysinfo.
panels.title: RSS Memory

panels.description: CPU seconds consumed per wall-clock second. 1.0 means one full CPU core.
panels.title: CPU Cores

panels.description: Total HTTP request throughput across selected targets.
panels.title: HTTP RPS

panels.description: Ratio of HTTP 5xx responses over all HTTP responses.
panels.title: HTTP 5xx Ratio

panels.description: Request rate by method, route pattern, and status. High-cardinality raw paths are intentionally not used by AsterDrive.
panels.title: Request Rate By Route

panels.description: HTTP request latency across all routes.
panels.title: HTTP Latency

panels.description: Response rate grouped by HTTP status code.
panels.title: HTTP Status Mix

panels.description: Slowest route patterns by p95 latency.

targets.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, method, route) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval]))))

panels.title: Slow Routes P95

panels.description: Client and server error ratios. 401/403/404 are included in the 4xx series.
panels.title: HTTP Error Ratios

panels.description: SeaORM query throughput grouped by backend, SQL kind, and status.
panels.title: DB Queries

panels.description: SeaORM query latency p95 grouped by backend and SQL kind.
panels.title: DB Query Latency P95

panels.description: Database query error rate. Any sustained non-zero value deserves log inspection.
panels.title: DB Errors

panels.description: Total DB query throughput across all SQL kinds.
panels.title: DB QPS

panels.description: Total DB average latency from histogram sum/count. Use this alongside p95, not instead of it.

targets.expr: sum by (backend, kind) (rate(db_query_duration_seconds_sum{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (backend, kind) (rate(db_query_duration_seconds_count{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])), 1e-9)

panels.title: DB Average Latency

panels.description: Storage driver operations grouped by driver, operation, status, and kind.
panels.title: Storage Operations

panels.description: Storage driver operation p95 latency.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, driver, operation, status) (rate(storage_driver_operation_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Storage Latency P95

panels.description: Storage not_found rate. For thumbnail/cache probes this can be expected; for blob reads it needs investigation.

targets.expr: sum by (driver, operation) (rate(storage_driver_operations_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", status="failure", kind="not_found"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Storage Not Found

panels.description: Storage failures excluding not_found. This is the better alert input than all failures.

targets.expr: sum by (driver, operation, kind) (rate(storage_driver_operations_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", status="failure", kind!="not_found"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Storage Hard Failures

panels.description: Average storage operation latency from histogram sum/count.

targets.expr: sum by (driver, operation, status) (rate(storage_driver_operation_duration_seconds_sum{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (driver, operation, status) (rate(storage_driver_operation_duration_seconds_count{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])), 1e-9)

panels.title: Storage Average Latency

panels.description: File upload results by mode and status.
panels.title: Uploads

panels.description: Upload sessions created by mode.
panels.title: Upload Sessions

panels.description: Download outcomes by source and range mode.
panels.title: Downloads

panels.description: Upload session lifecycle events such as complete and cancel.
panels.title: Upload Session Events

panels.description: Upload and download failures. A small number can be normal during client aborts; sustained growth is not.
panels.title: Transfer Failures

panels.description: Current pending/retryable background task backlog.
panels.title: Task Backlog

panels.description: Current pending shared download rollback operations.
panels.title: Share Rollback Pending

panels.description: Background task state transitions grouped by kind and target status.
panels.title: Task Transitions

panels.description: Background task retry rate grouped by task kind.
panels.title: Task Retries

panels.description: Share download rollback queue event rate.
panels.title: Share Rollback Events

panels.description: Login and token refresh events grouped by action, status, and reason.
panels.title: Auth Events

panels.description: Authentication failure ratio. Status values come from the auth service recorder.
panels.title: Auth Failure Ratio

panels.description: RSS memory over time.
panels.title: RSS Memory

panels.description: CPU core usage derived from accumulated CPU milliseconds.
panels.title: CPU Cores

panels.description: Process uptime. Drops indicate restart or target replacement.
panels.title: Uptime

title: AsterDrive Overview
